metadata.purpose: Track AI-assisted frontend development progress, errors, and learning

best_practices: Use React hooks at the top level of your components
Use TypeScript interfaces for props and state

setup.details: Next.js app exists with Tailwind v4 and base layout
setup.ai_notes: Align design tokens with Figma styles

authentication.details: Implemented auth flows, profile steps, role fields, and verification upload screens
authentication.ai_notes: Reuse existing auth components and update styles to match Figma

dashboard.ai_notes: Consider using a responsive grid system

routing.ai_notes: Use Next.js App Router for better performance

supabase.ai_notes: Initialize Supabase client in a separate config file

backend_api.ai_notes: Create API service layer with error handling

ai_interaction_log.details: Enhanced frontend context structure for better AI assistance
ai_interaction_log.ai_notes: Added detailed tracking for component status and AI learning

ai_interaction_log.details: Added email verification and account-created confirmation screens
Built profile completion step 1 form and route
Built profile completion step 2 form and route
Added role-based profile fields forms for provider and patient
Added verification upload screens for patient, nurse, doctor, lab, and pharmacist
ai_interaction_log.ai_notes: Added verification upload form + five role routes

next_steps: Wire auth forms to backend JWT endpoints
